title: Repair Result
description: Phase 3 Repair Pipeline output for an Engine Run. Reflects what the sandwich-loop in packages.generation.repair did with the Quality Gate findings: not-needed / no-fix-applied / fixed / partial-fix, plus telemetry around mechanical and LLM fixes. ADR 0013 deferred this schema until Sprint 3+; ADR 0017 + Sprint 3C-lite ship it now to close the contract gap. The shape mirrors packages.generation.repair.RepairResult; tests/test_artefact_schema_3c_lite.py locks the two against drift (top-level + nested $defs).

status.description: Aggregate Repair Pipeline status. not-needed when Quality Gate was already ok; no-fix-applied when failures had no applicable mechanical or LLM fix; fixed when the sandwich loop drove gate-status to ok; partial-fix when at least one mechanical fix succeeded but the gate still reports degraded or failed after re-run.

reason.description: One-paragraph explanation of why the pipeline reached this status. Operator-facing.

mechanicalFixesApplied.description: One entry per mechanical fix attempt during this run. Empty when no findings matched a registered fix or when do_repair was False.

llmFixesApplied.description: One entry per LLM-fix call. Always empty in Sprint 3B / 3B-next; populated when Sprint 5+ wires the LLM-fix path per fix-registry.v1.json:llmFixes.

remainingErrors.description: Findings the pipeline could not (or chose not to) fix, formatted as '<check-name>: <finding>'. After a sandwich pass this reflects POST-repair findings, not pre-repair.

qualityStatusBefore.description: QualityResult.status at the start of the pipeline. Null when caller did not run the pipeline against a real Quality Gate result (mock pipelines, dev_generate).

qualityStatusAfter.description: QualityResult.status after the final re-run. Null on Sprint 3A-shaped callers; equals qualityStatusBefore when iterations is 0.

iterations.description: Number of successful sandwich-loop passes (apply-fixes + re-run-gate cycles). Bounded by fix-registry.v1.json:loopLimits.maxTotalSandwichPasses.

kind.description: Whether the fix came from a deterministic mechanical fix (Sprint 3B+) or an LLM-fix call (Sprint 5+).

name.description: Registry id of the fix from governance/policies/fix-registry.v1.json (e.g. 'ensure-default-export').

target.description: POSIX-style relative path to the file the fix attempted to mutate.

detail.description: Per-attempt detail (what was changed, or why the attempt failed).

success.description: Whether the fix actually mutated the target. False entries record attempts that hit the fix's onFailure path (skip-and-log etc.).
